bio: Producer, DJ and songwriter Calvin Harris stands as the figurehead for modern dance music, having broken world records and dominated the charts. He has over 35 billion combined audio and video streams in his career history, making him one of the most viewed artists on YouTube and one of Sony Music's biggest streaming artists.

rows: This Is What You Came For

Feels (feat. Pharrell Williams, Katy Perry & Big Sean)
